data.body: S4 (6673) SPLIT per user decision. LANDED-to-stack the validated transport-seam half: 4 transport sites route through select_backend().transport, provider 'jira' literals->backend.vendor, apply_handlers direct exception import, ~34 test doubles migrated module->transport shape (0 assertions changed, verified via diff), new neutrality gate. Full reconcile suite 1376 GREEN (behavior-preserving), lint+typecheck GREEN, teeth/no-weakening verified. Committed 0f72040d2, pushed Gerrit change 903 (stack 900<-901<-902<-903). Deferred differ/apply core-importer DI routing + leak relocations to follow-up task 4af8-2d88-719e-4478 (educable-absurd-myna, discovered_from 6673) — blocked by standalone spec_from_file_location loader convention needing a DI refactor. T4 advisory (rollback) satisfied: atomic commit, git revert back-out noted in commit msg. TODO before closing S4: narrow its ACs to the landed scope (importer-routing ACs moved to 4af8).
